INSERT INTO services (service_key,name_de,name_en,name_tr,name_ar,description_de,description_en) VALUES
('website','Webseite-Entwicklung','Website Development','Web Sitesi Geliştirme','تطوير المواقع','Professionelle Webseiten für lokale Unternehmen.','Professional websites for local businesses.'),
('ai_agent','KI-Agent-Entwicklung','AI Agent Development','Yapay Zeka Ajanı','تطوير وكيل الذكاء','KI-Agenten für Support und Buchung — 24/7 aktiv.','24/7 AI agents for support and booking.'),
('workflow','Workflow-Automatisierung','Workflow Automation','İş Akışı Otomasyonu','أتمتة سير العمل','Automatisierung manueller Geschäftsprozesse.','Automation of manual business processes.'),
('app_dev','App-Entwicklung','App Development','Uygulama Geliştirme','تطوير التطبيقات','CRM, Buchungssysteme, interne Dashboards, SaaS.','CRM systems, booking portals, dashboards, SaaS.'),
('support_bot','Kundensupport-Bot','Customer Support Bot','Müşteri Destek Botu','بوت الدعم','WhatsApp-Bots, Chatbots und E-Mail-Automatisierung.','WhatsApp bots, chatbots, and email automation.'),
('appointments','Terminautomatisierung','Appointment Automation','Randevu Otomasyonu','أتمتة المواعيد','24/7 Buchung, Erinnerungen und No-Show-Wiederherstellung.','24/7 booking, reminders, no-show recovery.'),
('lead_gen','Lead-Generierung','Lead Generation','Müşteri Adayı Üretimi','توليد العملاء','Sofortige Lead-Reaktion, KI-Qualifizierung, Follow-up.','Instant response, AI qualification, follow-up sequences.'),
('devops','DevOps-Services','DevOps Services','DevOps Hizmetleri','خدمات DevOps','CI/CD, Kubernetes, Cloud-Infrastruktur, Monitoring.','CI/CD, Kubernetes, cloud infrastructure, monitoring.'),
('platform','CrowPus-Plattform','CrowPus Platform','CrowPus Platformu','منصة CrowPus','All-in-one: ersetzt Jira, Slack, Jenkins, Terraform, n8n.','All-in-one: replaces Jira, Slack, Jenkins, Terraform, n8n.')
ON CONFLICT (service_key) DO NOTHING;

parameters.noteText:
══════════════════════════════════════════
  DEE EMPIRE — DATABASE FOUNDATION
  Complete setup in one workflow
══════════════════════════════════════════

RUN ONCE to initialize the entire company
database from scratch.

This workflow covers EVERYTHING:
  Section 1 → 6 CRM tables
  Section 2 → 4 Support tables
  Section 3 → Companies + Dee Empire data
  Section 4 → Document system (2 tables)
  Section 5 → i18n translations (54 keys)
  Section 6 → Services catalog (9 + 20)

SAFE TO RE-RUN:
  All SQL uses IF NOT EXISTS and
  ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING.
  No data will be lost or duplicated.

TOTAL: 12 tables created, ~90 rows seeded.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  SECTION 1 — CRM CORE TABLES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Creates 6 tables for managing sales:

leads            Track every prospect
customers        Active paying clients
opportunities    Sales deals & pipeline
communications   All call/email/WhatsApp history
proposals        Quotes and contracts
financial_tracking  Monthly MRR snapshots

All tables include:
  • UUID primary keys
  • TIMESTAMPTZ timestamps
  • company_id (soft link to companies)
  • preferred_language (de/en/tr/ar)

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  SECTION 2 — SUPPORT TABLES
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Creates 4 foundation tables used by
all other workflows:

i18n_translations  All UI labels in de/en/tr/ar.
                   Every dropdown key maps here.
message_templates  WhatsApp/email/SMS templates.
                   Keyed by language + channel.
services           9 service types with names
                   in 4 languages.
service_packages   20 pricing tiers in EUR.
                   Setup fee + monthly fee ranges.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  SECTION 3 — COMPANY IDENTITY
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Creates companies table and seeds
Dee Empire as the first company.

Table fields include:
  name, legal_name
  tax_number     230/274/01007
  vat_id         DE455289768
  iban           DE7177061040000236373
  bic            GENODEF1ALK
  address        Forststraße 6
                 96264 Altenkunstadt
  phone          09572 8744 123
  email          admin@dee-empire.com
  website        https://dee-empire.com
  company_type   own / client
  currency       EUR

Used on: all invoices, proposals,
         contracts (§14 UStG compliance).

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  SECTION 4 — DOCUMENT SYSTEM
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Creates 2 document tracking tables:

document_sequences
  Auto-incrementing number counter.
  One row per document type per year.
  Seeded for 2026:
    DEE-INV (invoices)
    DEE-PRO (proposals)
    DEE-CON (contracts)
    DEE-NDA (NDAs)
    DEE-RPT (reports)
    DEE-ONB (onboarding)
    DEE-QUO (quotes)
    DEE-REC (receipts)

documents
  Master registry for every file ever
  created. Stores: document_number,
  document_type, file_format (pdf/docx/
  xlsx/html/csv/png/jpg/zip), file_url,
  storage_provider, storage_key,
  financial amounts, lifecycle timestamps.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  SECTION 5 — i18n TRANSLATIONS
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Seeds 54 translation keys in de/en/tr/ar.

Categories:
  status (16)      new, contacted, qualified,
                   disqualified, open, in_progress,
                   won, lost, active, at_risk,
                   churned, draft, sent, accepted,
                   rejected, negotiating
  industry (12)    salon, clinic, restaurant,
                   real_estate, retail, agency,
                   tech, hotel, legal, education,
                   logistics, other
  service_type (9) website, ai_agent, workflow,
                   app_dev, support_bot, appointments,
                   lead_gen, devops, platform
  priority (4)     critical, high, medium, low
  lead_source (5)  manual_search, linkedin, referral,
                   inbound, cold_outreach
  file_format (8)  pdf, docx, xlsx, html,
                   csv, png, jpg, zip

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
  SECTION 6 — SERVICES CATALOG
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Seeds full product and pricing catalog.

9 Services:
  website, ai_agent, workflow, app_dev,
  support_bot, appointments, lead_gen,
  devops, platform
  (each with names in de/en/tr/ar)

20 Packages (all in EUR):
  Website: Basic/Business/E-Commerce
  AI Agent: Basic/Business/Multi/Enterprise
  Workflow: Single/Bundle/Full
  Appointments: Basic/Full/Clinic
  Lead Gen: Bot/Full System
  Support Bot: FAQ/AI Agent
  Platform: Starter/Growth/Enterprise

Used by: proposal generator, pricing
         calculator, sales pipeline.
